title: OTG: Serene Landscapes
description: This is a fork of VanillaVistas but with BOP features and improved biome distribution.
body:
## Requirements: 

[Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.12.2)

[Dynamic Trees](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamictrees/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.12.2)

[Dynamic Trees BOP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dtbop/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.12.2)

[Open Terrain Generator](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-terrain-generator-continued)

[Colorful Water](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/colorfulwater)

**You can travel to each preset via portals:**

Quartz = Jungle

Snow = Frozen

Stone = Temperate

Sandstone = Desert
